jobs.purpose: Resolve `Branch.address` → `Branch.coordinates` via the configured geocoding subprocessor. Dispatched by the BranchObserver on BranchCreated + BranchAddressUpdated (when coordinates.source === 'geocoded'), by the `POST /branches/{branch}/geocode` endpoint, and by the `branch:geocode` command.
steps: Refuse when tenant lacks `branch_geocoding` entitlement (BRANCH_GEOCODING_UNAVAILABLE, job fails hard — no retry).
Compute `address_hash = sha256(canonical(branch.address))` for the idempotency key.
Skip when a completed geocode result for the same `address_hash` already exists (short-circuit).
Resolve the driver via `GeocodingClient::driver(config('branch.geocoding.provider'))` — google / mapbox / nominatim.
Call `driver.geocode(structured_address)` — returns { lat, lng, accuracy_m, confidence, formatted, place_id }.
Refuse when `confidence < config('branch.geocoding.quality_threshold')` (default 0.75) — BRANCH_GEOCODING_LOW_QUALITY. Job fails soft (no retry) + coordinates stay at their prior value.
UPDATE the Branch: coordinates = { lat, lng, accuracy_m, source: 'geocoded' }.
Server-side re-computes address.formatted from the subprocessor's canonical string when it differs from the tenant-submitted formatted (audit-logged for drift detection).
The Eloquent update itself fires BranchCoordinatesUpdated via the observer.

jobs.purpose: Nightly integrity job. Scans every `(tenant, organization)` tuple + verifies the default-branch invariant holds: exactly one `is_default = true` Branch per (tenant, organization). Fixes drift by promoting the oldest non-closed Branch to default when a tuple has zero defaults, and by demoting all-but-one when a tuple has multiple (should be impossible via observer, but partial unique index race conditions during a bulk operation could theoretically slip past).
steps: SELECT tenant_id, organization_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_default=true) FROM branches WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status != 'closed' GROUP BY tenant_id, organization_id.
For each tuple with default_count = 0: promote the oldest by created_at.
For each tuple with default_count > 1: demote all but the first (by created_at); fire BranchDefaultChanged for each change.
Emit `academorix.branch.reconcile.corrections` metric per tenant + write a compliance-severity audit row when > 0 corrections.
jobs.notes: Killable via `branch.reconcile_default_invariant` feature flag during large data-migration windows where the invariant is temporarily violated by design.

jobs.purpose: On BranchClosed, notify every Staff / Coach / Reception User currently assigned to this Branch. Batched — one job per closure, iterates the affected users internally + dispatches individual `BranchClosedNotification` mails. Deferred from the BranchClosed listener because the recipient enumeration is DB-heavy (joins across staff / coaches / tenant_members) + can produce thousands of recipients on a large chain-gym branch closure.
steps: SELECT user_id FROM staff / coaches / tenant_members WHERE branch_id = :branch_id AND deleted_at IS NULL.
DISTINCT — one recipient per unique User even when they hold multiple roles at the branch.
For each recipient: dispatch BranchClosedNotification via the configured notification channels (default: mail).
